name: sr_analytical_routing_biggest_spenders
notes: Variation on the VT-595 analytical-routing regression: a value-ranking analytical ask ('who were my biggest spenders that went quiet') must also not mis-route to the status_query raw-count fast-path. Run: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 6 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> sr_analytical_routing_biggest_spenders.json`.

steps.message: out of everyone who's stopped buying, who were actually my biggest spenders before they went quiet?
steps.note: A ranking/analytical ask over the lapsed segment — must engage real analysis (delegation or a substantive answer), never the bare status_query count-only reply, never D1.

steps.message: how many customers do I have?
steps.note: Pure count ask still fast-paths to the raw number regardless of step 1's outcome.
